channel.title: About WordPress
channel.description:
1. Is there any way to create the WordPress theme like I go to the WordPress admin -> Appearance and i find a theme created by Frontity and I activate it. 2. Is there any way to run WordPress and Frontity on the same domain like WordPress backend domain is "www.testing.com/wp-admin" and its frontend domain is "www.testing.com"
Thank you.

item.title: About WordPress
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
• Is there any way to create the WordPress theme like I go to the WordPress admin → Appearance and i find a theme created by Frontity and I activate it.

If I understand your question correctly, the answer is no. Your frontity theme is a difference concept from your wordpress theme.

  • Is there any way to run WordPress and Frontity on the same domain like WordPress backend domain is “www.testing.com/wp-admin” and its frontend domain is “www.testing.com ”

Yes, you can do that using embedded mode: Embedded Mode - Frontity Docs
It will not be as performant, but it has its benefits as well.

Good luck!

Read full topic

item.title: About WordPress
item.dc:creator: help.highaddons
item.description:
1. Is there any way to create the WordPress theme like I go to the WordPress admin → Appearance and i find a theme created by Frontity and I activate it.
  2. Is there any way to run WordPress and Frontity on the same domain like WordPress backend domain is “www.testing.com/wp-admin” and its frontend domain is “www.testing.com”

Thank you.

Read full topic
